# municipal-markets-dashboard

**Auto-generated mirror.** Do not edit files in this repo by hand —
they are overwritten by the MMR pipeline's sync step.

Source of truth: [`bbillington/Municipal-Market-Research`](https://github.com/bbillington/Municipal-Market-Research)
under `docs/`. Edit there, run `py Processing/run_all.py`, and the sync
will propagate changes here on next pipeline run (or invoke
`py scripts/sync_to_public_dashboard.py` from the MMR repo to push
without re-running the pipeline).

GitHub Pages serves this repo's root on `main` to
https://bbillington.github.io/municipal-markets-dashboard/.

Last sync: see git log.
